user.title: Hive Local TRV
user.description: TRVs already paired in Zigbee2MQTT are discovered automatically every 30 seconds.

abort.already_configured: This Zigbee2MQTT instance is already configured.

boost.name: Boost
boost.description: Start a timed boost on a TRV or room group.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The TRV or room climate entity.

end_boost.name: End Boost
end_boost.description: Cancel an active boost and return to the previous mode.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The TRV or room climate entity.

set_schedule.name: Set Schedule
set_schedule.description: Set a weekly heating schedule for a TRV or room group.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The TRV or room climate entity.

clear_schedule.name: Clear Schedule
clear_schedule.description: Remove the schedule from a TRV or room group.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The TRV or room climate entity.

advance_schedule.name: Advance Schedule
advance_schedule.description: Skip to the next scheduled slot immediately — like Hive's advance button.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The TRV or room climate entity.

set_holiday.name: Set Holiday Mode
set_holiday.description: Activate frost protection for a date range. Restores previous mode on return.

cancel_holiday.name: Cancel Holiday Mode
cancel_holiday.description: Cancel an active or scheduled holiday and restore previous modes.

add_room.name: Add Room Group
add_room.description: Create a virtual room combining multiple TRVs and optional temperature sensors.

trv_entity_ids.description: Z2M friendly names of TRVs to include.

temp_sensor_entity_ids.description: Optional HA sensor entity_ids for room temperature.

room_name.name: Room name
